name: extract-full-bid-prompt-rules
title: Extract full-bid prompt rules into structured workflow
description: Extract the external full-bid prompt template into structured AnalysisReport/ReviewReport contracts and reusable staged prompt rules.

notes: Added complete-bid rule extraction: bid structure, review items, business/price scoring, price rules, fixed formats, signatures, evidence chains, and expanded pre-export review checks. Verified backend py_compile, Pydantic construction, and frontend production build.
